OptionDescription.SourceString: If you have a Custom Video ID you want to display instead of the default stream, you can enter it here. Having anything in this field will cause the device to ignore the "Video to Play" option.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: If you have a Custom Video ID you want to display instead of the default stream, you can enter it here. Having anything in this field will cause the device to ignore the "Video to Play" option.
